name: ticlaw
description: TiClaw Workspace — core monorepo containing the TiClaw Runner, Gateway, and CLI

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run build && pnpm --filter @ticlaw/runner run build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run build && concurrently -n gateway,runner -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @ticlaw/gateway run dev" "sleep 1 && pnpm --filter @ticlaw/runner run dev"
